haitian_creole.barry_harris_1929_2021_codified_bebop_: Barry Harris (1929-2021) te òganize amoni bebop nan yon sistèm. Sistèm li a itilize akò 6yèm olye 7yèm epi li ajoute akò diminished ki pase ant degre gam yo pou dirije vwa a byen.
haitian_creole.attack_time_to_reach_full_volume_decay: Attack: tan pou rive nan volim konplè. Decay: tan pou desann rive nan sustain. Sustain: nivo volim ki kenbe. Release: tan pou disparèt apre ou lage kle a.
haitian_creole.a_scale_is_an_ordered_set_of_pitches_m: Yon gam se yon seri pitch ki nan lòd. Modes yo se wotasyon gam nan ki kòmanse sou diferan degre. Chak youn kreye yon anbyans emosyonèl diferan.
haitian_creole.chords_are_built_by_stacking_intervals: Akò yo bati nan anpile entèval (3yèm). Major itilize yon 3yèm major + 3yèm minor. Minor ranvèse yo. Akò etann ajoute 7yèm, 9yèm, ak plis.
haitian_creole.kicks_use_a_sine_oscillator_with_a_pit: Kick yo itilize yon oscillator sine ak yon pitch sweep. Snare melanje bri (filtre) + kò ton. Hi-hat itilize eklat bri filtre high-pass.
haitian_creole.4_4_4_quarter_note_beats_per_bar_most_: 4/4 = 4 bat quarter-note pa bar (pi komen an). 3/4 = santiman waltz. 6/8 = konpoze doub. 5/4 ak 7/8 kreye groove asimetrik, egzotik.
haitian_creole.keys_arranged_by_ascending_5ths_clockw: Kle yo ranje pa 5yèm k'ap monte nan sans revèy la. Kle vwazen pataje 6 nan 7 nòt. Ale nan sans revèy la ajoute sharps; kont sans revèy ajoute flats.
haitian_creole.every_musical_sound_contains_overtones: Chak son mizik gen overtone anwo fondamantal la. Fòs relatif yo detèmine timbre — se poutèt sa yon twonpèt sonnen diferan de yon flit sou menm pitch la.
haitian_creole.an_interval_is_the_distance_between_tw: Yon entèval se distans ant de pitch, ki mezire an semiton. Rapò frekans detèmine konsonans (rapò senp tankou 3:2 sonnen dous).
haitian_creole.plays_chord_notes_one_at_a_time_in_seq: Jwe nòt akò yo youn apre lòt an sekans. Anwo = de anba pou anlè, Anba = de anlè pou anba. Kreye modèl k'ap koule de akò estatik.
haitian_creole.a_filter_removes_frequencies_above_low: Yon filtè retire frekans ki anwo (lowpass), anba (highpass), oswa alantou (bandpass) yon frekans cutoff. Rezonans (Q) amplifye frekans toupre cutoff, li kreye yon pik.
haitian_creole.tremolo_periodic_volume_changes_amplit: Tremolo: chanjman volim periodik (amplitude modulation). Vibrato: chanjman pitch periodik (frequency modulation). Toude kontwole pa yon LFO (Low Frequency Oscillator).
haitian_creole.discovered_in_1983_a_noise_burst_feeds: Yo dekouvri l an 1983. Yon eklat bri antre nan yon delay line trè kout ak feedback. Tan delay la detèmine pitch. Yon filtè nan feedback loop la kontwole klète ak decay. Li imite kòd yo rale natirèlman.
haitian_creole.the_sequencer_is_a_composition_tool_ea: Sequencer a se yon zouti konpozisyon. Chak step reprezante yon subdivizyon bat. Ranje melodi a fikse nòt ki gen pitch, tanbou ajoute rit. Notasyon mizik montre sa ou kreye.
haitian_creole.notes_on_lines_and_spaces_represent_pi: Nòt sou liy ak espas reprezante pitch. Dire montre pa fòm nòt la: antye (○), mwatye (𝅗𝅥), ka (♩), wityèm (♪). Estaf la gen 5 liy.
haitian_creole.equal_temperament_12_notes_per_octave_: Temperaman egal: 12 nòt pa oktav, rapò 2^(1/12). A4 = 440 Hz; A5 = 880 Hz. Well-Tempered Clavier Bach (1722) te konvenk mond lan sou konpwomi sa a. Chak nòt ou jwe la ap viv sou griy sa a.
haitian_creole.major_w_w_h_w_w_w_h_minor_w_h_w_w_h_w_: Major: T-T-M-T-T-T-M. Minor: T-M-T-T-M-T-T (T=ton konplè, M=mwatye). 7 mode yo (Ionian, Dorian, Phrygian, Lydian, Mixolydian, Aeolian, Locrian) soti nan wotasyon modèl entèval gam major la.
haitian_creole.triads_root_third_fifth_major_4_3_semi: Triad: rasin + 3yèm + 5yèm. Major (4+3 semiton), minor (3+4), diminished (3+3), augmented (4+4). Akò 7yèm ajoute yon lòt 3yèm. Mizik pop = ~6 akò k'ap repete; jazz itilize ekstansyon ak sibstitisyon.
haitian_creole.harmony_pad_voiced_pads_drones: Pad Amoni — pad ak vwa + drones
haitian_creole.sustained_chord_textures_the_bed_under: Teksti akò soutni — kabann anba prèske chak eskò sinematik. Eseye iv-V-i nan minor, oswa i-VI-VII pou santiman Hans Zimmer. Drones nan 5yèm soutni mizik klasik Endyen ak tradisyon bagpipe.
haitian_creole.beat_pad_sample_based_drums: Beat Pad — tanbou ki baze sou sample
haitian_creole.most_popular_music_sits_at_4_4_90_130_: Pifò mizik popilè chita nan 4/4, 90-130 BPM. Hip-hop ~85-95, house 120-130, drum-and-bass ~170 (santiman half-time). Kick sou 1+3, snare sou 2+4 = backbeat — fondasyon rock + pop.
haitian_creole.pythagoras_500_bce_discovered_consonan: Pythagoras (~500 BCE) te dekouvri konsonans de rapò frekans antye: oktav 2:1, 5yèm 3:2, 4yèm 4:3. Helmholtz te elaji sa an 1862. Son = onn konpresyon; mizik = modèl nou dakò rele bèl.
haitian_creole.full_chord_grid_strum_plate_and_voice_: Griy akò konplè, plak strum, ak presets vwa
haitian_creole.drag_across_strings_to_strum: Trennen atravè kòd yo pou strum!
haitian_creole.frequency_modulation_fm_synthesis_uses: Sentèz Frequency Modulation (FM) itilize yon oscillator (modulator) pou chanje frekans yon lòt (carrier) rapidman. Rapò modulator:carrier detèmine kontni harmonic. Rapò senp (1:1, 2:1, 3:1) pwodui ton harmonic. Rapò konplèks pwodui son metalik, tankou klòch, oswa inharmonic. Yamaha DX7 te popilarize FM an 1983.
haitian_creole.supersaw_stacks_multiple_sawtooth_osci: SuperSaw anpile plizyè oscillator sawtooth ki yon ti kras detune youn de lòt. Sa kreye yon son ki gwo, laj, ki klere — mak EDM, trance, ak pop modèn. Plis vwa = pi epè men itilize plis CPU. Detuning kontwole konbyen vwa yo akòde lwen youn de lòt — plis detune = pi laj/tankou chorus, mwens = pi sere/pi konsantre.
haitian_creole.an_arpeggiator_plays_the_notes_of_a_ch: 🔬 Yon arpeggiator jwe nòt yon akò youn apre lòt an sekans. "Anwo" ale de anba pou anlè, li kreye enèji k'ap monte. "Anba" desann pou yon santiman kaskad. To kontwole vitès (pi ba = pi rapid). Gate kontwole konbyen tan chak nòt sonnen (100% = legato, 10% = staccato). Eseye to=100ms + 4 oktav + modèl anwo pou yon arpeggio trance klasik!
haitian_creole.sing_speak_or_play_an_instrument_hear_: Chante, pale, oswa jwe yon enstriman — tande efè yo an tan reyèl!
haitian_creole.monitor_hear_yourself_use_headphones: 🔊 Monitè (tande tèt ou — sèvi ak kaskèt!)
haitian_creole.removes_frequencies_above_lowpass_or_b: Retire frekans ki anwo (lowpass) oswa anba (highpass) yon sèy. Tankou kouvri bouch ou ak men w — frekans wo yo disparèt, son an vin pi "fonse."
haitian_creole.creates_echoes_by_copying_the_signal_a: Kreye eko lè li kopye siyal la epi rejwe l apre yon ti tan. Feedback kontwole konbyen eko ki repete.
haitian_creole.simulates_room_acoustics_by_creating_t: Imite akoustik yon chanm lè li kreye dè milye ti eko ki melanje ansanm. Ti chanm = reverb kout, katedral = reverb long.
haitian_creole.clips_the_waveform_peaks_turning_smoot: Koupe pik waveform yo, transfòme onn sine dous yo an fòm ki di, ki gen ang. Sa ajoute nouvo harmonics ki pa t nan son orijinal la.
haitian_creole.duplicates_the_signal_with_a_slight_co: Dwoble siyal la ak yon ti delay k'ap chanje toutan. Sa imite plizyè vwa/enstriman k'ap jwe ansanm yon ti jan pa alinye.
haitian_creole.rapidly_varies_the_volume_up_and_down_: Fè volim nan varye anwo ak anba rapidman, li kreye yon efè k'ap bat. Komen nan gita surf ak mizik òg.
haitian_creole.use_headphones_when_monitoring_to_avoi: Sèvi ak kaskèt lè w ap monitè pou evite feedback loops! Mik la pase nan tout efè anwo yo (filtè, delay, reverb, elatriye) — ajiste yo pou tande kijan chak youn transfòme vwa w oswa enstriman w.
haitian_creole.connect_your_microphone_to_run_your_vo: Konekte mikwofòn ou pou fè vwa w oswa enstriman w pase nan chèn efè a an tan reyèl.
haitian_creole.see_your_voice_as_a_waveform_frequency: Wè vwa w tankou yon waveform + spectre frekans. Tande kijan filtè, delay, reverb, distortion, ak chorus chanje onn son fizikman.
haitian_creole.touch_drag_x_pitch_y_filter_effect: Manyen & trennen — X = pitch, Y = filtè/efè
haitian_creole.the_xy_pad_maps_your_finger_mouse_posi: Pad XY a kat pozisyon dwèt/sourit ou nan paramèt mizik an tan reyèl. Aks X kontwole pitch (goch = ba, dwat = wo). Aks Y kontwole frekans cutoff filtè a (anlè = klere, anba = fonse). Sa sanble ak enstriman tankou Korg Kaoss Pad, ki te revolisyone pèfòmans mizik elektwonik ann dirèk lè li transfòme jès 2D an son.
haitian_creole.xy_performance_pad_left_right_is_pitch: Pad pèfòmans XY. Goch–dwat se pitch, anlè–anba se klète filtè. Sèvi ak flèch yo pou deplase epi jwe yon nòt; peze Escape oswa Space pou kanpe.
haitian_creole.sequencer_drum_pads_notation_samples_m: Sequencer, drum pads, notasyon, samples & plis →
haitian_creole.click_cells_to_place_notes_visual_melo: Klike sou selil pou mete nòt — editè melodi vizyèl
haitian_creole.chord_progressions_create_emotional_jo: Pwogresyon akò kreye vwayaj emosyonèl. Akò I (tonic) santi tankou 'lakay.' Akò V (dominant) kreye tansyon ki vle rezoud tounen nan I. Akò vi (minor relatif) ajoute tristès oswa pwofondè. Akò IV (subdominant) deplase lwen de lakay dousman. Yo estime pwogresyon I-V-vi-IV parèt nan plis pase 70% chanson pop paske li balanse emosyon sa yo pafètman.
haitian_creole.roman_numerals_i_ii_iii_iv_v_vi_vii_re: Chif women (I, ii, iii, IV, V, vi, vii°) reprezante degre gam. Lèt majiskil = akò major. Lèt miniskil = akò minor.
haitian_creole.click_notes_to_hear_them: Klike sou nòt yo pou tande yo!
haitian_creole.add_melody_notes_in_the_grid_above: Ajoute nòt melodi nan griy anwo a ↑
haitian_creole.click_melody_cells_in_the_grid_above_t: Klike sou selil melodi nan griy anwo a pou wè notasyon isit la
haitian_creole.load_this_rhythm_into_row_0_kick: Chaje rit sa a nan ranje 0 (Kick)?
haitian_creole.click_challenge_me_to_practice_rhythm_: Klike sou "Defye m!" pou pratike modèl rit
haitian_creole.upload_wav_mp3_files_for_custom_pads_s: Telechaje fichye WAV/MP3 pou pads pèsonalize. Samples efase lè paj la rafrechi.
haitian_creole.chain_patterns_into_a_full_song: Chene modèl yo nan yon chanson konplè
haitian_creole.add_current_pattern_as_a_section: Ajoute modèl aktyèl la kòm yon seksyon
haitian_creole.create_a_drum_pattern_in_the_grid_abov: Kreye yon modèl tanbou nan griy anwo a, epi klike sou "+ Ajoute Aktyèl la kòm Seksyon" pou kòmanse konstwi yon chanson.
haitian_creole.sections_intro_verse_chorus_bridge_cho: Seksyon: Entwo → Kouple → Refren → Pon → Refren → Outro
haitian_creole.no_saved_beats_yet_create_a_pattern_an: Poko gen bat ki sove. Kreye yon modèl epi klike Sove!
haitian_creole.harmonypad_creates_warm_pure_tones_by_: HarmonyPad kreye ton cho, pi lè li melanje onn sine ak triyang. Chwazi yon vwa, pran yon akò nan griy anba a, epi strum plak la!
haitian_creole.chord_grid_tap_to_select_space_to_stru: 🎶 Griy Akò — manyen pou chwazi, Space pou strum
haitian_creole.strum_plate_tap_or_drag_across: 🎸 Plak Strum — manyen oswa trennen atravè
haitian_creole.hear_see_the_waveform_and_learn_the_st: Tande, wè waveform, epi aprann istwa chak enstriman
haitian_creole.this_is_how_different_instruments_get_: Se konsa diferan enstriman jwenn son inik yo! Yon flit se sitou harmonic 1 (sine). Yon klarinèt gen harmonics enpè (1,3,5,7). Yon vyolon gen tout. Klike pou konstwi pwòp timbre ou!
haitian_creole.karplus_strong_synthesis_creates_reali: Sentèz Karplus-Strong kreye son kòd rale reyalis lè li itilize yon eklat bri kout ki voye nan yon delay line ak feedback filtre. Ajiste klète (koulè bri inisyal) ak damping (longè sustain) pou fòme karaktè kòd la.
haitian_creole.identify_each_note_in_the_4_note_melod: Idantifye chak nòt nan melodi 4 nòt la:
haitian_creole.fundamental_heavy_gentle_highs_acousti: Fondamantal lou, wo dous. Tankou acoustic.
haitian_creole.mid_heavy_without_fundamental_woody_cu: Mitan lou san fondamantal — tankou bwa/flit kouku.
haitian_creole.almost_pure_fundamental_muffled_sub_li: Prèske fondamantal pi — toufe / tankou sub.
haitian_creole.roughly_equal_harmonics_full_natural_t: Harmonics apeprè egal — timbre konplè / natirèl.
haitian_creole.adjust_fundamental_mid_and_high_harmon: Ajiste nivo harmonic fondamantal, mitan, ak wo. Widget la klase son an nan youn nan senk timbre distenk. Pa gen nòt, pa gen revelasyon — jis sweep epi obsève.
haitian_creole.hypothesis_free_text_which_harmonic_le: Ipotèz (tèks lib): Ki nivo harmonic ki detèmine "klere" vs "cho"?
haitian_creole.hold_two_sliders_steady_move_one_watch: Kenbe de slider fiks. Deplase youn. Obsève.
haitian_creole.find_two_settings_producing_the_same_t: Jwenn de paramèt ki pwodui menm timbre a. Ki pwopòsyon yo pataje?
haitian_creole.real_instruments_have_characteristic_s: Vrè enstriman gen spectra karakteristik. Envestige poukisa flit sonnen diferan de vyolon.
haitian_creole.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Mwen konprann — eksplike nan pwòp mo mwen
haitian_creole.explain_how_harmonic_content_determine: Eksplike kijan kontni harmonic detèmine pèsepsyon timbre.
haitian_creole.design_note_discrete_5_class_timbre_ma: Nòt konsepsyon: makè timbre distenk 5 klas; pa gen nòt fidelite acoustic; pa gen revelasyon — espre.
haitian_creole.using_simple_everyday_words_and_short_: lè w sèvi ak mo senp chak jou ak fraz kout, san jargon
haitian_creole.for_a_5th_grade_student_brief_and_frie: pou yon elèv 5yèm ane, an kout ak amikal
haitian_creole.for_a_student_who_already_knows_some_m: pou yon elèv ki deja konnen kèk teyori mizik
haitian_creole.click_explain_for_the_ai_tutor_to_desc: Klike sou "Eksplike" pou titè IA a dekri sa view sa a anseye nan nivo lekti ou chwazi a.
haitian_creole.harmonic_series_why_instruments_sound_: 🎵 Seri Harmonic — Poukisa enstriman sonnen diferan
